name: Veggie Pizza Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 package dry Italian dressing or ranch dressing (your choice)
broccoli, onion, olives, pepper, shredded carrot, shredded cheese, and other veggies of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the crescent rolls on a cookie sheet.
2. Brush with beaten egg.
3. Bake at 375°F for about 11 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Cool completely.
5. Mix together cream cheese, dressing, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled dough.
7. Top with broccoli, onion, olives, pepper, shredded carrot, shredded cheese, and other veggies of your choice.
8. Chill before cutting into squares to serve.
